siblings.label: New Grad Software Engineer Jobs — entry-level roles for graduates
Remote Tech Jobs — work-from-anywhere engineering roles
AI & ML Jobs — AI-first roles, classified daily

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Every day. A GitHub Action pulls the freshest internship postings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls 400,000+ live listings directly from company career pages (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and more). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> for software engineering, data science, ML, product, or design internships.

faq.q: Which season are these internships for?
faq.a: Whatever companies are hiring for right now — as of mid-2026 that's mostly Fall 2026, Spring 2027, and early Summer 2027 openings. Because the list refreshes daily, new season postings show up here the day we first see them.
Check the companion list: New Grad Software Engineer Jobs — same daily refresh, entry-level full-time roles.

faq.q: Can a tool just apply to these for me?
faq.a: That's what Dreamwork does — it matches your résumé against every listing here, tailors your application, and can apply autonomously. The free tier shows all your matches.
